episode.title: Koko and the Lost Ladybug 🐞 A New Friendship | Bedtime Story | Koko's Forest Adventure
episode.description:
🐿️ Welcome to Koko's Forest Adventure! 叩叩的森林冒險

Today, Koko the squirrel meets a tiny lost ladybug named Lili. Can Koko help Lili find her way home? Together, they discover that one kind step can lead to a beautiful new friendship! 🌸

今天，小松鼠叩叩遇到了迷路的小瓢蟲亮亮。叩叩能幫亮亮找到回家的路嗎？一起來看這段關於友情與勇氣的溫馨故事！

🌟 Today's Vocabulary / 今日單字：
• LOST（迷路）— when you don't know where you are
• FRIEND（朋友）— someone who cares about you
• BRAVE（勇敢）— trying even when you feel a little scared

⏱️ Chapters / 章節：
0:00 Opening / 開場
0:15 Story begins / 故事開始
1:30 Koko hears Lili crying / 叩叩聽到亮亮在哭
3:00 The dark path / 黑暗的小路
3:45 The lesson / 今日小道理
4:15 ⭐ Word Time / 單字時間
5:00 Goodnight / 晚安時間

✨ Remember to enable subtitles for bilingual captions! 記得開字幕看中英雙語！

📖 About this series:
Koko's Forest Adventure is a gentle bilingual bedtime story series for children aged 2–6. Each episode teaches 3 English vocabulary words through warm, heartfelt stories featuring Koko and her forest friends.

叩叩的森林冒險是一套為2至6歲幼兒設計的溫柔雙語睡前故事系列。每集透過溫馨的故事，帶領孩子學習三個英文單字。

🔔 Subscribe for new stories every week!
每週都有新故事，記得訂閱！

#KokosForestAdventure #叩叩的森林冒險 #EnglishForKids #BilingualStory #BedtimeStory #PreschoolEnglish #英文故事 #睡前故事 #親子英文 #兒童英語 免費訂閱叩叩電子報 — 每週五收到故事精華、英文單字卡、親子活動，還有免費著色本 PDF！
